description: Develop a SeisComP client application in Python at `~/pick_monitor.py` that monitors real-time seismic phase picks by subscribing to the PICK messaging group. The application must intercept picks injected into the messaging system from `~/sample_pick.xml` and log the publicID of each detected pick to `~/pick_log.txt` using the format "DETECTED PICK: <publicID>". Use the SeisComP messaging API on the localhost bus to receive the picks rather than reading the XML file directly.
